video_details.title: 3 Trading Lessons Market Wizards Know That You Don't
video_details.description:
I'm incredibly proud to announce that I'll be featured in Market Wizards: The Next Generation by Jack Schwager and George Coyle, dropping June 9th. In this video, I break down the three core truths that tie every Market Wizard together, from why early struggles don't define you to why risk management is the foundation of every long career. I also take you behind the scenes of the intense selection process, including the full trading record audit and hours of interviews that went into getting featured in the book. If you've ever been inspired by the Market Wizards series, this one is for you.

📘 Purchase Your Copy of "Market Wizards: The Next Generation" here: https://www.amazon.com/Market-Wizards-Generation-worlds-traders/dp/1804093637
 
✅ Join my trading course ➡️: https://theonelanceb.com/

🐂 All free content is sponsored by Clear Street, my broker of choice! https://tinyurl.com/ClearSt-Lance
___________________________

ABOUT ME

If you’re new to my channel, my name is Lance Breitstein. I spent over a decade trading equities at Trillium, setting the record for the highest PNL in a single year as their Top Trader. I trained dozens of traders to become successes while managing Trillium’s Chicago office. With over $100m in verified profits, I now spend my time focused on turning good traders into greats and greats into GOATs. Advisor to SMB Capital and mentor of 7- and 8-figure PER YEAR traders. I am to be profiled in the next edition of Jack Schwager’s Market Wizards.

The journey is never easy. Trading is one of the most difficult, but most rewarding jobs imaginable. I am here to help you on your path, wherever that leads you.

May you want it bad enough to overcome any obstacles.
-(The One) Lance B
___________________________
DISCLOSURE Information shared here is for educational purposes only. This is not investment or trading advice. Make your own independent decisions. Full terms: https://theonelanceb.com/terms-of-service/
